active_answer: the ability to breathe of the person being tied
active_question: What does Rope365 say to monitor when opening a chest harness’s diamonds makes the tie tighter?
edited_answer: Monitor the tied person's breathing as you open the diamonds, because the harness becomes progressively tighter.
edited_question: What should you monitor while opening the diamonds in a chest harness?
paraphrase_rationale: The original question was ungrammatical and its answer was a bare noun phrase; the revision preserves the same source-supported safety guidance in a direct, self-contained form.
reason: The original question was ungrammatical and its answer was a bare noun phrase; the revision preserves the same source-supported safety guidance in a direct, self-contained form.
support_evidence: Opening the diamonds will make the tie progressively tighter, watch out for the ability to breathe of the person being tied. Make sure you discuss ahead placement between the legs. You can split ropes after one of the knots to go around the waist instead.
